data.content: Setup writers now emit complete settings.toml defaults including dispatchMode, backend, defaults, and pools; added a regression test that sources setup.sh and agent-wizard.sh and parses the written TOML. Verification: bun run lint (warnings only), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, targeted setup-settings-writer test after rebase. Note: bun run build fails on pristine origin/main as a pre-existing Next.js prerender error, so build remains baseline-red rather than introduced by this patch.
